name: team field with matchup_opponent_type param
description: Test case for team field with matchup_opponent_type param
expected_query: with "current_week_opponents" as (select "h" as "nfl_team", "v" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "seas_type" = 'PRE' union select "v" as "nfl_team", "h" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "seas_type" = 'PRE'), "tb1730f419d2cecf04f7ce85ddf0f0097" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "team", count(distinct "nfl_plays"."esbid") as "rate_type_total_count" from "nfl_plays" where "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_PRE_WEEK_1', '2024_PRE_WEEK_2', '2024_PRE_WEEK_3', '2024_PRE_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_5', '2024_REG_WEEK_6', '2024_REG_WEEK_7', '2024_REG_WEEK_8', '2024_REG_WEEK_9', '2024_REG_WEEK_10', '2024_REG_WEEK_11', '2024_REG_WEEK_12', '2024_REG_WEEK_13', '2024_REG_WEEK_14', '2024_REG_WEEK_15', '2024_REG_WEEK_16', '2024_REG_WEEK_17', '2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2024_REG_WEEK_19', '2024_REG_WEEK_20', '2024_REG_WEEK_21', '2024_POST_WEEK_1', '2024_POST_WEEK_2', '2024_POST_WEEK_3', '2024_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" = 'REG' and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2024) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "t6af0f4b72eb62849047770e3601d77d4" as (select "year", "week", v as nfl_team, h as game_opponent, true as game_is_home from "nfl_games" where "nfl_week_id" in ('2026_PRE_WEEK_0') and h IN ('WAS', 'ARI', 'LAR') union select "year", "week", h as nfl_team, v as game_opponent, false as game_is_home from "nfl_games" where "nfl_week_id" in ('2026_PRE_WEEK_0') and v IN ('WAS', 'ARI', 'LAR')), "tbff99edc24d975c8fb9ec2fd9d5ac9a2" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."def" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_PRE_WEEK_1', '2024_PRE_WEEK_2', '2024_PRE_WEEK_3', '2024_PRE_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_5', '2024_REG_WEEK_6', '2024_REG_WEEK_7', '2024_REG_WEEK_8', '2024_REG_WEEK_9', '2024_REG_WEEK_10', '2024_REG_WEEK_11', '2024_REG_WEEK_12', '2024_REG_WEEK_13', '2024_REG_WEEK_14', '2024_REG_WEEK_15', '2024_REG_WEEK_16', '2024_REG_WEEK_17', '2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2024_REG_WEEK_19', '2024_REG_WEEK_20', '2024_REG_WEEK_21', '2024_POST_WEEK_1', '2024_POST_WEEK_2', '2024_POST_WEEK_3', '2024_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) group by "nfl_plays"."def"), "tbff99edc24d975c8fb9ec2fd9d5ac9a2_team_stats" as materialized (select "tbff99edc24d975c8fb9ec2fd9d5ac9a2"."nfl_team", sum(tbff99edc24d975c8fb9ec2fd9d5ac9a2.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays from "tbff99edc24d975c8fb9ec2fd9d5ac9a2" group by "tbff99edc24d975c8fb9ec2fd9d5ac9a2"."nfl_team") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos" AS "pos_0", CAST(tbff99edc24d975c8fb9ec2fd9d5ac9a2_team_stats.team_pass_yds_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(tb1730f419d2cecf04f7ce85ddf0f0097.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "current_week_opponents" on "player"."current_nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."nfl_team" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2024 left join "tb1730f419d2cecf04f7ce85ddf0f0097" on "tb1730f419d2cecf04f7ce85ddf0f0097"."team" = "current_week_opponents"."opponent" inner join "t6af0f4b72eb62849047770e3601d77d4" on "t6af0f4b72eb62849047770e3601d77d4"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" left join "tbff99edc24d975c8fb9ec2fd9d5ac9a2_team_stats" on "tbff99edc24d975c8fb9ec2fd9d5ac9a2_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."opponent" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos", "tbff99edc24d975c8fb9ec2fd9d5ac9a2_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", tb1730f419d2cecf04f7ce85ddf0f0097.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
